name: IdsEdwIndvBeMaraClnclClsFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
'WITH input_data AS ( 
  SELECT
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.INDV_BE_KEY,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_ID,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.PRCS_YR_MO_SK,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_CT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_LAST_OBSRV_MO_NO,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.DXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
    COALESCE(CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD, ''UNK'') AS SRC_SYS_CD,
    INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.VRSN_ID
  FROM ',
   pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,
   '.INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS
  LEFT JOIN ',
   pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,
   '.CD_MPPNG CD_MPPNG
    ON INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD_MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK
  WHERE INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= ',
   pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle,
   '
    AND CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD = ',
   pipeline().parameters.SrcSysNm,
   '
),
 top1 AS (
   SELECT VRSN_ID
   FROM input_data
   FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
 ),
 main_flow AS (
   SELECT
     INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
     INDV_BE_KEY,
     CLNCL_CLS_ID,
     PRCS_YR_MO_SK,
     SRC_SYS_CD,
     CAST(',
   pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate,
   ' AS CHAR(10)) AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
     CAST(',
   pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate,
   ' AS CHAR(10)) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
     MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
     CLNCL_CLS_CT,
     CLNCL_CLS_LAST_OBSRV_MO_NO,
     CXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
     CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
     CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
     CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
     DXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
     DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
     DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
     DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
     ',
   pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle,
   ' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     ',
   pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle,
   ' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     VRSN_ID
   FROM input_data
   WHERE INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK <> 1
     AND INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK <> 0
 ),
 na_flow AS (
   SELECT
     1 AS INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
     1 AS INDV_BE_KEY,
     ''NA'' AS CLNCL_CLS_ID,
     ''NA'' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK,
     ''NA'' AS SRC_SYS_CD,
     ''1753-01-01'' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
     ''1753-01-01'' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
     1 AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
     0 AS CLNCL_CLS_CT,
     0 AS CLNCL_CLS_LAST_OBSRV_MO_NO,
     0 AS CXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
     0 AS CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
     0 AS CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
     0 AS CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
     100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     t.VRSN_ID
   FROM top1 t
 ),
 unk_flow AS (
   SELECT
     0 AS INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
     0 AS INDV_BE_KEY,
     ''UNK'' AS CLNCL_CLS_ID,
     ''UNK'' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK,
     ''UNK'' AS SRC_SYS_CD,
     ''1753-01-01'' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
     ''1753-01-01'' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
     0 AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,
     0 AS CLNCL_CLS_CT,
     0 AS CLNCL_CLS_LAST_OBSRV_MO_NO,
     0 AS CXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
     0 AS CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
     0 AS CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
     0 AS CXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_CONC_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_0_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_3_PCT,
     0 AS DXADJOR_PROSP_LAG_6_PCT,
     100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
     t.VRSN_ID
   FROM top1 t
 )
 SELECT * FROM main_flow
 UNION ALL
 SELECT * FROM na_flow
 UNION ALL
 SELECT * FROM unk_flow'
)

Description:
